name: Roll of Red Gaffers Tape
description: You’ve found the 'Universal Fixing Agent,' or as the build team calls it, the only thing keeping the bumper fabric from flapping in the breeze during a collision. Unlike cheap duct tape, this Red Gaffer's Tape leaves no residue—which is great, because the mentors would lose their minds if we gunked up the anodized aluminum frame. It’s a Hard find because it’s partially buried under a stack of CAD prints and scouting sheets, showing only a sliver of that distinctive 'Safety Red' adhesive. In the world of FRC, finding this roll is like finding a golden ticket; it’s the most stolen item in the pit, usually vanishing the moment a team three stalls over realizes their radio is vibrating loose.
